description: Tezgah detayi: secili tezgahin haftalik state cizelgesi, her tezgah icin ayri state pasta grafigi, toplam haftalik ve aylik running (Execution=ACTIVE) sureleri.

panels.description: Secili tezgahin son 7 gunluk state cizelgesi. Renkler: RUNNING=yesil (Execution=ACTIVE), IDLE=mavi, STOPPED=turuncu, OFFLINE=kirmizi.

targets.query:
reach = from(bucket: "mtconnect")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.machine_id == "${machine}" and r._measurement == "mtconnect_status" and r._field == "reachable")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _time: r._time, machine_name: r.machine_name, _value: if r._value then "_ONLINE" else "OFFLINE" }))

exec = from(bucket: "mtconnect")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.machine_id == "${machine}" and r._measurement == "mtconnect" and r.item_type == "Execution" and r._field == "value_str")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      machine_name: r.machine_name,
      _value: if r._value == "ACTIVE" then "RUNNING"
              else if r._value == "UNAVAILABLE" then "STOPPED"
              else "IDLE"
  }))

union(tables: [reach, exec])
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value != "_ONLINE")
  |> group(columns: ["machine_name"])
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Secili tezgah haftalik state cizelgesi - $machine

panels.description: Secili tarih araliginda her tezgah icin state suresi dagilimi.

targets.query:
poll = 2.0

offline = from(bucket: "mtconnect")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.machine_id == "${pie_machine}" and r._measurement == "mtconnect_status" and r._field == "reachable" and r._value == false)
  |> group()
  |> count()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _time: now(), state: "OFFLINE", _value: float(v: r._value) * poll }))

exec_states = from(bucket: "mtconnect")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.machine_id == "${pie_machine}" and r._measurement == "mtconnect" and r.item_type == "Execution" and r._field == "value_str")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with state:
      if r._value == "ACTIVE" then "RUNNING"
      else if r._value == "UNAVAILABLE" then "STOPPED"
      else "IDLE"
  }))
  |> group(columns: ["state"])
  |> count()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _time: now(), state: r.state, _value: float(v: r._value) * poll }))

union(tables: [offline, exec_states])
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["state"], valueColumn: "_value")

panels.title: $pie_machine

panels.description: Son 7 gunde tum tezgahlarin toplam RUNNING (Execution=ACTIVE) suresi. Time-picker bu paneli etkilemez; her zaman -7d araligini kullanir.

targets.query:
poll = 2.0

from(bucket: "mtconnect")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mtconnect" and r.item_type == "Execution" and r._field == "value_str" and r._value == "ACTIVE")
  |> group(columns: ["machine_id", "machine_name"])
  |> count()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: now(),
      _field: r.machine_name,
      _value: float(v: r._value) * poll / 3600.0
  }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_field", "_value"])
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

panels.title: Haftalik running suresi (son 7 gun, tezgah basina)

panels.description: Son 30 gunde tum tezgahlarin toplam RUNNING (Execution=ACTIVE) suresi. Time-picker bu paneli etkilemez; her zaman -30d araligini kullanir.

targets.query:
poll = 2.0

from(bucket: "mtconnect")
  |> range(start: -30d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mtconnect" and r.item_type == "Execution" and r._field == "value_str" and r._value == "ACTIVE")
  |> group(columns: ["machine_id", "machine_name"])
  |> count()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: now(),
      _field: r.machine_name,
      _value: float(v: r._value) * poll / 3600.0
  }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_field", "_value"])
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

panels.title: Aylik running suresi (son 30 gun, tezgah basina)

list.description: Pasta grafiklerini her tezgah icin tekrarlamak icin kullanilan gizli degisken.
list.label: Pasta repeat
list.name: pie_machine

title: SE Havacilik - Tezgah Detay
